signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: We're seeing balances increase on a per account basis, not just new accounts adding to our deposits. We're also seeing increased spending on a per account basis.
signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: Our actual CDR rates realized in Q3 were 3.44% versus an assumed 4.6% embedded in the marks — 116 basis points per year below what is actually embedded in the mark.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We will continue to make sure that we balance growth versus profitability next year, committed to GAAP profitability for the full year at 30% incremental EBITDA margin.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We sold at 105.1% and the book is marked at 104.0%; 219 basis points of cost savings between our deposits and warehouse facilities resulting in meaningful benefit to net interest margin.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I remain confident that no company is better positioned than SoFi to be the winner that takes most in the digital transformation of financial services.
